title: CRD Converters
description: An addon for Cobblemon Raid Dens that allow Myths and Legends items + others to convert raid dens into specific bosses.
body:
This is an addon mod for [Cobblemon Raid Dens](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemonraiddens) that allows players to force a particular raid boss to spawn using key items.

By default, the config contains the items from Myths and Legends v1.7.2 only, and **does not** include the legendary raid bosses to allow the items to work. If you would like to add legendary raid bosses, join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/6jBar3y6nt) for the Official Addons.
